content: Next.js auth 2025: Auth.js v5 (NextAuth) is in maintenance mode — primary contributor left Jan 2025, lacks built-in 2FA/passkeys/RBAC/multi-tenancy. Better Auth v1.6.x is the community successor — framework-agnostic TypeScript auth library, includes 2FA, multi-tenant, RBAC, stateless sessions, active development. Clerk is hosted auth-as-a-service with prebuilt UI, ~30 min setup, Organizations feature for RBAC/teams, but gets expensive past 50K MAU and locks data in US. Supabase Auth is best if already on Supabase — ties into Postgres RLS, 50K MAU free tier. Recommendation: Better Auth for self-hosted control with full features; Clerk if you want to ship auth in one day and cost is acceptable.
